sentences.target: Je continue après le déjeuner, pas avant.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kɔ̃.ti.ny a.pʁɛ lə de.ʒœ.ne pa a.vɑ̃/

translations.fr: Je continue après le déjeuner, pas avant.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kɔ̃.ti.ny a.pʁɛ lə de.ʒœ.ne pa a.vɑ̃/
translations.en: I'll keep going after lunch, not before.
translations.es: Seguiré después del almuerzo, no antes.
translations.de: Ich mache nach dem Mittagessen weiter, nicht vorher.
translations.ko: 점심 먹고 나서 계속할게요, 그전에는 안 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我午饭后再继续，不会提前。
translations.yue: 我食完晏晝先繼續，唔會提前。
translations.ru: Я продолжу после обеда, не раньше.
translations.pt: Vou continuar depois do almoço, não antes.
translations.he: אמשיך אחרי ארוחת הצהריים, לא לפני.
translations.tr: Öğle yemeğinden sonra devam edeceğim, daha önce değil.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ tiếp tục sau bữa trưa, không phải trước đó.
translations.nl: Ik ga na de lunch verder, niet eerder.
translations.uk: Я продовжу після обіду, не раніше.
translations.hi: मैं दोपहर के भोजन के बाद जारी रखूँगा, उससे पहले नहीं.
translations.pl: Będę kontynuować po obiedzie, nie wcześniej.
translations.el: Θα συνεχίσω μετά το μεσημεριανό, όχι πριν.
translations.nb: Jeg fortsetter etter lunsj, ikke før.
translations.id: Saya akan lanjut setelah makan siang, bukan sebelumnya.
translations.sv: Jag fortsätter efter lunch, inte före.
translations.ro: Voi continua după prânz, nu înainte.
translations.cs: Budu pokračovat po obědě, ne dříve.
translations.da: Jeg fortsætter efter frokost, ikke før.
translations.fi: Jatkan lounaan jälkeen, en sitä ennen.
translations.ja: 昼食後に続けます、それまではしません.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular, agreeing with 'Je'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of 'déjeuner'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'après'.
Adverb of negation/restriction used without 'ne' in the phrase 'pas avant'.
Temporal adverb; in 'pas avant' expresses a lower bound in time.

sentences.target: On continue cette série ce soir.

translations.fr: On continue cette série ce soir.
translations.es: Seguimos con esta serie esta noche.
translations.de: Wir machen mit dieser Serie heute Abend weiter.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤에 이 시리즈를 계속 볼 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今晚继续看这部剧。
translations.yue: 我哋今晚繼續睇呢套劇。
translations.ru: Мы продолжим смотреть этот сериал сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Vamos continuar esta série hoje à noite.
translations.he: אנחנו ממשיכים עם הסדרה הזאת הערב.
translations.tr: Bu diziyi bu akşam izlemeye devam ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng ta sẽ tiếp tục xem loạt phim này.
translations.nl: We gaan vanavond met deze serie verder.
translations.uk: Ми продовжимо дивитися цей серіал сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hu: Ma este folytatjuk ezt a sorozatot.
translations.hi: हम आज रात यह सीरीज़ देखना जारी रखेंगे.
translations.nb: Vi fortsetter på denne serien i kveld.
translations.id: Malam ini kita lanjut menonton serial ini.
translations.sv: Vi fortsätter med den här serien i kväll.
translations.cs: Dnes večer budeme dál sledovat tenhle seriál.
translations.da: Vi fortsætter med denne serie i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜このシリーズを見続けます.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal pronoun, 3rd person singular; commonly used for 'we' as the subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular, agreeing with 'On'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'série'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'continue'.
Demonstrative determiner in the temporal expression 'ce soir'.
Common noun; head of the temporal phrase 'ce soir' (time adjunct).

sentences.target: Elle continue sans pause depuis midi.

translations.fr: Elle continue sans pause depuis midi.
translations.en: She keeps going without a break since noon.
translations.es: Ella sigue sin parar desde el mediodía.
translations.de: Sie macht seit Mittag ohne Pause weiter.
translations.it: Va avanti senza pausa da mezzogiorno.
translations.ko: 그녀는 정오부터 쉬지 않고 계속하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她从中午起一直没休息。
translations.yue: 佢由中午開始一路冇停過。
translations.ru: Она с полудня без перерыва работает.
translations.pt: Ela segue sem pausa desde o meio-dia.
translations.he: היא ממשיכה בלי הפסקה מאז הצהריים.
translations.tr: Öğle saatinden beri ara vermeden devam ediyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy tiếp tục không nghỉ từ trưa đến giờ.
translations.ar: إنها تواصل دون توقف منذ الظهر.
translations.nl: Ze gaat sinds het middaguur zonder pauze door.
translations.uk: Вона з полудня без перепочинку працює.
translations.hi: वह दोपहर से बिना रुके काम कर रही है.
translations.pl: Ona od południa bez przerwy pracuje.
translations.el: Συνεχίζει χωρίς διάλειμμα από το μεσημέρι.
translations.nb: Hun har holdt på uten pause siden lunsj.
translations.id: Dia terus tanpa jeda sejak siang.
translations.sv: Hon har fortsatt utan paus sedan lunch.
translations.ro: Ea continuă fără pauză de la prânz.
translations.da: Hun har fortsat uden pause siden frokost.
translations.fi: Hän on jatkanut ilman taukoa keskipäivästä lähtien.
translations.ja: 彼女は正午から休みなく続けています.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular, agreeing with 'Elle'.
Preposition introducing a manner complement.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'sans'.
Preposition marking the starting point of an ongoing situation.
Common noun denoting a time point; complement of 'depuis'.

sentences.target: La pluie continue depuis trois jours.

translations.fr: La pluie continue depuis trois jours.
translations.en: It's been raining for three days.
translations.vi: Trời đã mưa suốt ba ngày rồi.
translations.hi: तीन दिनों से बारिश हो रही है.
translations.nb: Det har regnet i tre dager.
translations.sv: Det har regnat i tre dagar.
translations.da: Det har regnet i tre dage.
translations.ja: もう三日間雨が降り続いています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pluie'.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular, agreeing with 'pluie'.
Preposition introducing a duration expressing an ongoing situation.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'jours' in a duration expression.
Common noun, plural; complement of 'depuis' indicating duration.
